_documentation.purpose: Manual, human-vetted corrections to a car's canonical vehicle_identity. Use this ONLY for genuine one-offs the data-driven registry in scraper/identity.py cannot reasonably infer (a mistitled listing, an obscure build). Systematic model knowledge belongs in the REGISTRY, not here.
_documentation.key: Each override key is a STABLE identifier for one listing. Use, in order of preference: the BaT auction key 'bat:<id>' (e.g. 'bat:116070319'), or the exact stable listing URL ('https://bringatrailer.com/listing/<slug>/'). A bare numeric id string also matches. Keys are matched exactly against a record's id / listing_url.
_documentation.effect: Listed fields replace the title-derived values; the identity is marked manually_overridden=true, source='override', and confidence is raised to 'high' (a human vetted it).

bat:0000000000._note: example only — id 0 matches no real listing
